permissions.commentary: OGL-Canada 2.0 does not grant a patent licence. The Exemptions clause expressly carves patents out of the licensed subject matter; the licence neither grants an express patent right nor forbids the Information Provider from asserting patents. Patent exposure is out of scope and default patent law applies.
